title: SeeSharp Configuration
description: Configuration schema for SeeSharp agent harness instances. Supports both global (~/.seesharp/config.json) and per-workspace (seesharp.config.json) files.

$schema.description: JSON schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

agentName.description: Display name used in the system prompt identity. Default: 'SeeSharp'.

preferredModel.description: Preferred LM Studio model ID for the main agent. Null means use whatever is loaded.

maxAgentTurnsPerTask.description: Maximum tool-loop turns per user task.

maxToolCallsPerTurn.description: Maximum tool invocations extracted from a single assistant message.

maxSuccessfulToolExecutionsPerTask.description: Hard cap on non-skipped tool executions per task.

bashCommandTimeoutSeconds.description: Wall-clock cap (seconds) for a single BASH tool command.

responsesApiCallTimeoutMinutes.description: Per-request cap (minutes) for main model Responses API calls.

contextualizerCallTimeoutMinutes.description: Per-request cap (minutes) for contextualizer chat completion calls.

maxNoProgressTurns.description: Consecutive turns with identical tool signatures before stopping.

maxResponseRetries.description: Retry attempts for failed main model API calls.

systemPrompt.description: Customize the system prompt sent to the main model.

prepend.description: Text inserted before the generated system prompt (e.g. personality, role).

append.description: Text appended after the generated system prompt (e.g. additional rules).

replace.description: If non-null, completely replaces the auto-generated system prompt. Use with caution.

contextualizer.description: Controls the contextualizer pipeline that indexes the workspace.

maxFilesToRead.description: Maximum files the contextualizer reads per run.

maxCharsPerFile.description: Maximum characters read per file before truncation.

excludedDirectories.description: Directory names to skip during workspace indexing.

pinnedFiles.description: Relative paths always included first in the contextualizer file list.

preferredModel.description: Override the contextualizer model ID (default from env or 'qwen/qwen3.5-2b').

customTools.description: User-defined tools the agent can invoke.

name.description: Tool name (uppercase, e.g. 'LINT_PROJECT'). Must not collide with built-in tools.

description.description: Human-readable description shown to the model in the tool registry.

type.description: Execution type: 'bash' runs a shell command, 'http' makes an HTTP request.

command.description: (bash type) Shell command template. Use {{paramName}} for parameter interpolation.

workingDirectory.description: (bash type) Working directory (relative to workspace root).

parameters.description: Parameter names expected by the template.

url.description: (http type) URL template. Use {{paramName}} for interpolation.

body.description: (http type) Request body template for POST requests.

disabledTools.description: Built-in tool names to hide from the model (e.g. ['LIST_FILE', 'READ_FILE']).
